1. Function declaration, void Navigation_AntennaStateHandlerOpenCir(Dem_UdsStatusByteType oldStatus, Dem_UdsStatusByteType newStatus); 2. Macro defined function, #define Navigation_GetTimeStamp Navigation_GetTimeStamp_Client

1. Function definition, called by DEM, update the latest antenna open circuit fault state (GNSS_ANT_OK or GNSS_ANT_OPEN_CIRCUIT) to global variable gAntennaStatetoDynCfg v.1.53, and send the state to SOC with time stamp by call f.1.2. If global variable Cal_GnssDrSrc v.1.33 is CSM, to set event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_CDD_IVIHandler_Navigation_AntennaState_Run in TCI_AppTask15.
1. Function declaration, void Navigation_AntennaStateHandlerShortCir(Dem_UdsStatusByteType oldStatus, Dem_UdsStatusByteType newStatus); 2. Macro defined function, same as f.1.2

1. Function definition, called by DEM, update the latest antenna short circuit fault state (GNSS_ANT_OK or GNSS_ANT_SHORT_CIRCUIT) to global variable gAntennaStatetoDynCfg v.1.53, and send the state to SOC with time stamp by call f.3.2. If global variable Cal_GnssDrSrc v.1.33 is CSM, to set event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_CDD_IVIHandler_Navigation_AntennaState_Run in TCI_AppTask15.
DLT related functions are not intended to be introduced here
DLT related functions are not intended to be introduced here
1. Function declaration, void Navigation_GetSoCRequestCfg(void); 2. Function declaration, void Navigation_DynamicConfigMsg(void); 3. Macro defined function, same as f.1.2

1. Function definition, called by f.8.2, to update global variable gTriggerDynConfig v.1.49 by call f.22.73, when it returns 1. 2. Function definition, called by TCI_AppTask15 , when event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_Navigation_Navigation_DynamicConfigMsg is matched in Rte_OsApplication_QM.c. - Also called by Navigation_GAWThandler f.14.6, periodically. - First call f.8.1 to check if new dynamic configuration request from SOC is triggered, by variable gTriggerDynConfig v.1.49. - According to value of variable Cal_GnssDrSrc v.1.3, witch is initialized by function Navigation_Init f.16.1. - And also in different cases of variables' value of v.1.34~1.48,  to send different navigation configure data to different target sensor, by call function WriteNavigation_AccelGyroDynCfg f.22.3. - Target sensor is 0x01 for 1D gyro data; 0x02 for 1D accel data, when connected variant without delta height. - Target sensor is 0x03 for 3D gyro data; 0x04 for 3D accel data, when connected variant with delta height. - In case variable Cal_GnssDrSrc v.1.3 is CSM instead of TCP, call function WriteNavigation_AntennaState f.22.4. to write antenna status variable gAntennaStatetoDynCfg v.1.53 (OK, Short Circle, Open Circle, by f.2.1/4.1 ) to SOC. - Global variable gMsgtoSoC v.1.51 is set to 1 by f.14.6, and set to 0 in this function once write navigation accel gyro dynamic configuration here.

1. Function definition, called by TCI_AppTask4 , when event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_Navigation_Navigation_ExternalPositioning_Received is matched in Rte_OsApplication_QM.c. Just update global variable v.1.25 isExternalPositionRcvd = TRUE.

1. Function declaration, void Navigation_ExternalPositioningHandler(void); 2. Function declaration, void Navigation_ExternalPositioningDateTime(uint8 GPST_PPSCldrYr, uint16 GPST_PPSCldrDy, uint32 GPST_PPSTmOfDy, uint32* l_Impl_NavExtPos1Data_ST_date, uint32* l_Impl_NavExtPos1Data_ST_time); 3. Function declaration, boolean Navigation_SetAnyValidPpsMsgRcvd(boolean AnyValidPpsMsgRcvd, uint16 TcpMsgFlag); 4. Function declaration, void Navigation_SetNavExtHeight(boolean GPSV_PPSElvtn_Inv, uint16* TcpMsgFlag, sint32* NavExtPos1DataHeight, uint32 GPSV_PPSElvtn); 5. Function declaration, void Navigation_SetNavExtVelocity(boolean GPSV_PPSCalcdSpd_Inv, uint16* TcpMsgFlag, sint16* NavExtPos1DataVelocity, uint8 GPSV_PPSCalcdSpd);

1. Function definition, called by TCI_AppTask17 when event Rte_Ev_Cyclic_TCI_AppTask17_0_100ms is matched in Rte_OsApplication_QM.c. First define a local variable for navigation external position data, update its elements one by one and update TcpMsgFlag mean while. - Date time element by f22.10/22.11/22.12/22.13/22.14/22.15, and convert by f.12.2; - Latitude element by f.22.31/22.32; - Longitude element by f.22.33/22.34; - Height (elevation) element by f.12.4; - Velocity element by f.12.5; - Heading element by f.22.20/22.21; - 2D position error estimation by f.22.22/22.23; - 3D position error estimation by f.22.24/22.25; - Heading error estimate by f.22.26; - Velocity error estimate by f.22.27/22.28; - PPS mode by f.2229/22.30. Finally, if v.1.25 is TRUE (set by f.10.1) and f.12.3 return TRUE, then call f.22.1 to write data to navigation data channel. 2. Function definition, called by f.12.1, convert date time from GPS data format to Navi data format. 3. Function definition, called by f.12.1, return if parameter TcpMsgFlag (set by f.12.4/12.5) is 0 or not. QUESTION: parameter 1 seems useless . 4. Function definition, called by f.12.1, if GPS calculated elevation is not invalid (get by f.22.19), then calculate navigation external position height value (get by f.22.18). And update TcpMsgFlag . 5. Function definition, called by f.12.1, if GPS calculated speed is not invalid (get by f.22.17), then calculate navigation external position velocity value (get by f.22.16). Also update TcpMsgFlag .

1. Navigation_SendPeriodGear 2. Navigation_SendAccelData 3. Navigation_SendGyroSensorTemperature 4. Navigation_SendGyroData 5. Navigation_SendWheelDistance 6. Navigation_GAWThandler 7. getVehGearStatus 8. SampleAccelData 9. SampleGyroData 10. ErrorMemory_WriteMessage 11. Navigation_GetTimeStamp

Function declaration, void Navigation_SendGyroSensorTemperature(uint32 getLogTimeStamp); 4. Function declaration, void Navigation_SendGyroData(uint32 getLogTimeStamp); 5. Function declaration, void Navigation_SendWheelDistance(uint32 getLogTimeStamp); 6. Function declaration, void Navigation_GAWThandler(void); 7. Function declaration, enVehGearStat getVehGearStatus(void); 8. Function declaration, void SampleAccelData(T3DPosInfo * accel_sampled_data ); 9. Function declaration, void SampleGyroData(T3DPosInfo * gyro_sampled_data); 10. Macro defined function, #define ErrorMemory_WriteMessage ErrorMemory_WriteMessage_Client 11. Macro defined function, same as f.1.2

1. Navigation_SendPeriodGear 2. Navigation_SendAccelData 3. Navigation_SendGyroSensorTemperature 4. Navigation_SendGyroData 5. Navigation_SendWheelDistance 6. Navigation_GAWThandler 7. getVehGearStatus 8. SampleAccelData 9. SampleGyroData

1. Function definition, called by f.14.6, 100ms period to send gear status message to INC. - Call f.22.49/22.50/22.53 to get vehicle gear state and validity - If the current gear state has changed compared to the previous state, set gear change flag - Check calibration variable v.1.37/1.38/1.45/1.46 of Gear Shift or PRND - Either Gear Shift or PRND and gear change flag is TRUE, call function getVehGearStatus f14.7 to get current gear state. - Call function WriteNavigation_GearData f.22.7 to send gear data with validity and time stamp, to set event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_CDD_IVIHandler_Nav_GearData_Run in TCI_AppTask13. 2. Function definition, called by f.14.6, 10ms period to send 3D accel message to INC. - Call f.14.8 to get the average value of sampled accel sensor data (x, y, z). - Add accel data out counter. - Set accel data validity always 0x07. - Update time stamp with input parameter. - Finally call WriteNavigation_AccelSensorData f.22.4, to send accel data to set event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_CDD_IVIHandler_Nav_AccelSensorData_Run in TCI_AppTask13. 3. Function definition, called by f.14.6, 100ms period to send temperature message to INC. - Set temperature of temperature sensor 1~8, with time stamp from input parameter. - Call WriteNavigation_NavTempData f.22.9, to send temperature data to set event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_CDD_IVIHandler_Nav_TempData_Run in TCI_AppTask13. 4. Function definition, called by f.14.6, 10ms period to send gyro message to INC., - Call f.14.9 to get the average value of sampled gyro sensor data (x, y, z). - Add gyro data out counter. - Set gyro data validity always 0x07. - Update time stamp with input parameter. - Finally call WriteNavigation_GyroSensorData f.22.8, to send gyro data to set event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_CDD_IVIHandler_Nav_GyroSensorData_Run in TCI_AppTask13. 5. Function definition, called by f.14.6, 10ms period to send distance message to INC, - Check calibration variable v.1.34/1.42 of DWS sensor, initialed in f.16.1 - If DWS sensor matched, calculate 4 wheels' distance in variable ipc_distance_log v.1.13 by 4 wheels' last value and roll count, variable v.1.14~1.17. - If distance valid flag (variable DistanceValidFlag v.1.29, set by f.20.2) is TRUE, update validity of v.1.13. - And call function WriteNav_WhlDist f22.2 to send wheel distance data with time stamp and validity to set event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_CDD_IVIHandler_Nav_WhlDistance_Run in TCI_AppTask13. 6. Function definition, called by TCI_SumTask6 when evetn Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_Navigation_Navigation_GAWThandler is matched in Rte_OsApplication_QM.c, - Define a local variable ExtGyroData for external gyro data. - Get value and validity of: Accel Longitude, Accel Latitude, Yaw Rate, by call f.22.40/22.41, f.22.42/f.22.43, f.22.54/f.22.55. (Step 2) - Get time stamp by Navigation_GetTimeStamp f.13.11. - Call function Navigation_DynamicConfigMsg f.8.2, to periodically send the dynamic config message to SOC. - Call function WriteUbloxMeasData f.20.5, to periodically compute the data to be sent to ublox. - Call function Navigation_SendWheelDistance f.14.5, send wheel distance data over INC to SOC. - Call function Navigation_SendGyroData f.14.4, send gyro data over INC to SOC. - Call function Navigation_SendGyroSensorTemperature f.14.3, send sensor temperature data over INC to SOC. - Call function Navigation_SendAccelData f.14.2, send accel data over INC to SOC. - Call function Navigation_SendPeriodGear f.14.1, send gear data over INC to SOC. - If calibration variable Cal_SensUtilVehYaw (v.1.40) and Cal_SensAvailVehYaw (v.1.48) matched, periodically update element of ExtGyroData (yaw rate, accel latitude, accel longitude) if their validity is TRUE, get by Step 2 this function. - Update validity, counter and time stamp of ExtGyroData . - Finally, call function WriteNavigation_ExtGyroData f.22.6, to send external gyro (vehicle gyro) data to set event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_CDD_IVIHandler_Nav_ExtGyroData_Run in TCI_AppTask13. 7. Function definition, called by f.14.1, simply put, obtaining the gear state of the vehicle, by call f.22.49/22.50/22.53。 8. Function definition,  called by f.14.2, calculate the average value of sampled accel sensor data (x, y, z), by global variable AccelSampleData , v.1.26. 9. Function definition,  called by f.14.4, calculate the average value of sampled gyro sensor data (x, y, z), by global variable GyroSampleData , v.1.27.
1. Navigation_Init 2. NavSensorAvail_IsAccelPresent 3. NavSensorAvail_IsGyroPresent 4. NavSensorAvail_IsNCRSensPresent 5. ReadAccelGyro_AccelDynConfig 6. ReadAccelGyro_GyroDynConfig

1. Function declaration, void Navigation_Init(void); 2. Macro defined function, #define NavSensorAvail_IsAccelPresent NavSensorAvail_IsAccelPresent_Client 3. Macro defined function, #define NavSensorAvail_IsGyroPresent NavSensorAvail_IsGyroPresent_Client 4. Macro defined function, #define NavSensorAvail_IsNCRSensPresent NavSensorAvail_IsNCRSensPresent_Client 5. Macro defined function, #define ReadAccelGyro_AccelDynConfig ReadAccelGyro_AccelDynConfig_Client 6. Macro defined function, #define ReadAccelGyro_GyroDynConfig ReadAccelGyro_GyroDynConfig_Client

1. Function definition, called by AppSWC_Init in Appl_Stubs.c. QUESTION: caller is not found or is by stub . - First, set 16 calibration global variants v.1.33~1.48 as their actual value by f.22.56~22.71. Set global variant v.1.50 by f.22.71. - Initialize navigation DLT by f.6.1. - If Cal_GnssDrSrc GNSS (v.1.31 Global Navigation Satellite System via TCP ), 3D Accel (v.1.36), 3D Gyro (1v.1.35) status all matched, initialize Accel by f.15.2 and Gyro by f.15.3, to set v1.30/1.31 as TRUE, it is means Accel/Gyro has initialized. And set variable g_CalReadAccelGyro v.1.54 as TRUE. - If Cal_GnssDrSrc GNSS (v.1.31 Global Navigation Satellite System via CSM ), initialize NCR (Ublox Sensor) by f.15.4, to set v.1.32 as TRUE, it is means Ublox has initialized. And set variable g_CalReadUbx v.1.55 as TRUE. - Finally, initialized variable for sensors' configuration data (1D/3D, minimum/maximum, raw/physical value of Accel and Gyro) StoredConfigSensors v1.52 by call f.15.5/15.6.

1. Function declaration, void Navigation_ReadGyroAcclDataRecord(void); 2. Function declaration, void WriteAccelData(s32 accel_x_out, s32 accel_y_out, s32 accel_z_out); 3. Function declaration, void WriteGyroData(s32 gyro_x_out, s32 gyro_y_out, s32 gyro_z_out); 4. Macro defined function, #define ReadAccelGyro_AccelData ReadAccelGyro_AccelData_Client 5. Macro defined function, #define ReadAccelGyro_GyroData ReadAccelGyro_GyroData_Client

1. Function definition, called by TCI_SumTask8 , when event Rte_Ev_Cyclic_TCI_SumTask8_0_10ms is matched in Rte_OsApplication_QM.c. - If variable isAccelInitDone v.1.30 is TRUE, witch is set by initialization function f.16.1, read Accel data (x, y, z) by f.17.4, and then write the data (x, y, z) to variable AccelSampleData v.1.26. - If variable isGyroInitDone v.1.31 is TRUE, witch is also set by initialization function f.16.1, read Gyro data (x, y, z, temperature) by f.17.5, and then write the data (x, y, z) to variable GyroSampleData v.1.27 and directly copy temperature to variable sampled_gyro_temp v.1.20 - Write Error memory! If the initialization status isAccelInitDone/isGyroInitDone (v.1.30/1.31) of the two sensors (Accel/Gyro) mentioned above is not TRUE detected 500 times after initialization function Navigation_Init f16.1 has called (then variable g_CalReadAccelGyro v1.54 is TRUE). 2. Function definition, called by f.18.1, copy Accel data (x, y, z) to variable AccelSampleData v.1.26 3. Function definition, called by f.18.1, copy Gyro data (x, y, z, but no temperature ) to variable GyroSampleData v.1.27

1. Navigation_UbloxTxMeasData 2. get_navigation_PPEI_Whl_Rotational_Stat_Message 3. navigation_Whl_Rotational_Stat_Count 4. navigation_accumulate_pulses 5. WriteUbloxMeasData 6. Measured_Delta_Value 7. Navigation_GetTimeStamp 8. Navigation_SetNCRNavSnsrInputData

1. Function declaration, void Navigation_UbloxTxMeasData(void); 2. Function declaration, void get_navigation_PPEI_Whl_Rotational_Stat_Message(void); 3. Function declaration, void navigation_Whl_Rotational_Stat_Count(void); 4. Function declaration, void navigation_accumulate_pulses(uint16 sample, WHEEL_DATA * wheel, uint8 lSignalInvalid, uint8 lSignalReset ); 5. Function declaration, void WriteUbloxMeasData(void); 6. Function declaration, uint32 Measured_Delta_Value(uint16 curr, uint32 prev, uint16 constMAX ); 7. Macro defined function, same as f.1.2 8. Macro defined function, #define Navigation_SetNCRNavSnsrInputData Navigation_SetNCRNavSnsrInputData_Client

1. Function definition, called by TCI_AppTask4 , when event Rte_Ev_Run_SWC_INFO_Navigation_Navigation_UbloxTxMeasData is matched in Rte_OsApplication_QM.c. But it is an empty function . 2. Function definition, called by function WriteUbloxMeasData f.20.5, for each wheel: - For both of 2 front wheels, get reset flag by call f.22.37, used for parameter of f.20.4 called later. - For both of 2 rear wheels, get reset flag by call f.22.48, used for parameter of f.20.4 called later. - For left front wheel, get sample point value by call f.22.35, and check if valid (variable DistanceValidFlag v1.29) by call f.22.36, then call f.20.4 to accumulate wheel's pulse. - For right front wheel, get sample point value by call f.22.37, and check if valid by call f.22.38, then call f.20.4 to accumulate wheel's pulse. - For left rear wheel, get sample point value by call f.22.44, and check if valid by call f.22.45, then call f.20.4 to accumulate wheel's pulse. - For right rear wheel, get sample point value by call f.22.46, and check if valid by call f.22.47, then call f.20.4 to accumulate wheel's pulse. 3. Function definition, called by function WriteUbloxMeasData f.20.5, update 4 wheels' distance value of global variable ipc_distance_log ( v.1.13), by four wheels' (global variable fr_wheel / fl_wheel / rr_wheel / rl_wheel v.114~1.17)  by last value add wheels' roll counts. 4. Function definition, called by functionget_navigation_PPEI_Whl_Rotational_Stat_Message f.20.2, for each wheel (global varaible fr_wheel / fl_wheel / rr_wheel / rl_wheel v.114~1.17), update their: - Accumulate roll counter, if signal is valid by per call. - Last value, if signal is valid by input parameter. - Reset roll counter to ZERO, if signal is valid and reset flag is set. 5. Function definition, called by function Navigation_GAWThandler f.14.6: - First get time stamp by call f19.7. - Call f.20.2, accumulate 4 wheels' pulse. - Call f.20.3, to update 4 wheels' distance value of global variable ipc_distance_log ( v.1.13). - Call f.20.6, calculate 2 rear wheels' delta value. - Calculate rear wheels' sum, Do not understand its usage . - Update 4 wheels' distance value, rear wheels' sum value mentioned above, and time stamp into local variable navigation data. - Finally, call function Navigation_SetNCRNavSnsrInputData f.19.8, write navigation data mentioned above to ublox sensor. 6. Function definition, called by function WriteUbloxMeasData f.20.5, for rear left and rear right wheel, calculate its delta value by previous value and current value. QUESTON: Do not understand the function's purpose .

content.text: Antenna State Handler - Open Circle/Short Circle
